mapper.sql: id, project_key, status, total_files, processed_files, passed_files, finding_count, error_files, error_message, created_at, started_at, completed_at, updated_at
mapper.select: INSERT INTO secure_coding_scan_job (project_key, status, total_files) VALUES (#{projectKey}, 'QUEUED', #{totalFiles}) RETURNING id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO secure_coding_scan_file (scan_job_id, document_id, file_name, file_type, status) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{documentId}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, 'QUEUED') ON CONFLICT (scan_job_id, document_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT FROM secure_coding_scan_job WHERE project_key = #{projectKey} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM secure_coding_scan_job WHERE project_key = #{projectKey} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM secure_coding_scan_job WHERE status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING') ORDER BY created_at
SELECT id, scan_job_id, document_id, file_name, file_type, status, error_message FROM secure_coding_scan_file WHERE scan_job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'QUEUED' ORDER BY id
SELECT document_id, file_name, file_type, status, severity, rule_id, message, start_line, start_column, end_line, end_column FROM secure_coding_scan_result WHERE scan_job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE secure_coding_scan_job SET status = 'RUNNING', started_at = COALESCE(started_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), error_message = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{jobId} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING')
UPDATE secure_coding_scan_file SET status = 'RUNNING', started_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, error_message = NULL WHERE id = #{fileId} AND status = 'QUEUED'
UPDATE secure_coding_scan_file SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{fileId} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE secure_coding_scan_job SET processed_files = processed_files + 1, passed_files = passed_files + #{passed}, finding_count = finding_count + #{findings}, error_files = error_files + #{errors}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{jobId} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE secure_coding_scan_job SET status = CASE WHEN error_files > 0 THEN 'COMPLETED_WITH_ERRORS' ELSE 'COMPLETED' END, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{jobId} AND status = 'RUNNING' AND processed_files >= total_files

UPDATE secure_coding_scan_job SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{jobId} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING')
UPDATE secure_coding_scan_file SET status = 'QUEUED', started_at = NULL WHERE scan_job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'RUNNING'
